pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Technical Foundations is an edge domain for the VP Data Products, this ability KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.466) and conceptual alignment to include at the vp level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Technical Foundations), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.466). External reviewers may question whether this specific ability KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the VP Data Products versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Technical foundation knowledge is validated by DCWF, NICE framework, and engineering director job postings as required for technical leadership oversight.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Technical Foundations appearing in job postings and role definition literature for VP Data Products.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations ability KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.466. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the VP Data Products.
